ip_outcome_note: suspected_ip field is empty string; ip_verified: false was a stale default. No IP flag to resolve.

trivia_bullets.text: From Modern Horizons 3 (June 14, 2024), where Eldrazi return as a major mechanical force with a new Emerge cycle. Eldrazi are distributed across all colors with colorless-hybrid mana costs.

Type line is 'Creature -- Eldrazi Sphinx,' a rare compound type fusing two distinct MTG lineages. The combination implies a Sphinx whose nature has been subsumed by Eldrazi corruption, supported by both the card name and the art's maze-guardian imagery.

8-cost (emerge {5}{C}{U}) 5/5 flier. Cast trigger puts stun counters on up to two permanents; a stun counter delays untapping by one full rotation, making it a genuine two-permanent tempo hit on entry.
EDHREC: approximately 1,770 Commander decks, rank 18,935 -- fringe inclusion. Eldrazi-tribal and Emerge-strategy commanders are primary homes. Not legal in Pauper.
sources: EDHREC: Twisted Riddlekeeper card page, via WebSearch snippet
